package rulecoverage

func NegativeRouteSetupScatteredWithoutRouterPackage() string {
    ruleID := "route_setup_scattered_without_router_package"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Route registration split across unrelated files without a clear `router`, `routes`, or `transport` home."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
